message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
participant "Issuer" as Issuer
participant "Contract" as Contract

Issuer -> Contract : //Revoke(h(Root<sub>ct</sub>), reason)//

Contract -> Contract : //MarkCredentialAsRevoked(h(Root<sub>ct</sub>))//

Contract --> Issuer : //Event : CredentialRevoked(h(Root<sub>ct</sub>), reason, timestamp)//
@enduml
```
